actions.name: AcceptMarketplaceRegistration
actions.description: Grants permission to register the Amazon Web Services Marketplace token for your Amazon Web Services account to activate your Oracle Database@Amazon Web Services subscription

actions.name: CreateCloudAutonomousVmCluster
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new Autonomous VM cluster in the specified Exadata infrastructure

actions.name: CreateCloudExadataInfrastructure
actions.description: Grants permission to create an Exadata infrastructure

actions.name: CreateCloudVmCluster
actions.description: Grants permission to create a VM cluster on the specified Exadata infrastructure

actions.name: CreateDbNode
actions.description: Grants permission to create a DB Node

actions.name: CreateGrantShare
actions.description: Grants permission to create an ODB Grant Share

actions.name: CreateOdbNetwork
actions.description: Grants permission to create an ODB network

actions.name: CreateOdbPeeringConnection
actions.description: Grants permission to create an ODB Peering Connection

actions.name: CreateOutboundIntegration
actions.description: Grants permission to create an Outbound Integration

actions.name: DeleteCloudAutonomousVmCluster
actions.description: Grants permission to Deletes an Autonomous VM cluster

actions.name: DeleteCloudExadataInfrastructure
actions.description: Grants permission to delete a specified Exadata infrastructure. Before you use this operation, make sure to delete all of the VM clusters that are hosted on this Exadata infrastructure

actions.name: DeleteCloudVmCluster
actions.description: Grants permission to delete a specified VM cluster

actions.name: DeleteDbNode
actions.description: Grants permission to delete a DB Node

actions.name: DeleteGrantShare
actions.description: Grants permission to delete an ODB Grant Share

actions.name: DeleteOdbNetwork
actions.description: Grants permission to delete the specified ODB network

actions.name: DeleteOdbPeeringConnection
actions.description: Grants permission to delete the specified ODB Peering Connection. When you delete an ODB peering connection, the underlying VPC peering connection is also deleted

actions.name: DeleteResourcePolicy
actions.description: Grants permission to delete a resource policy

actions.name: GetCloudAutonomousVmCluster
actions.description: Grants permission to get information about a specific Autonomous VM cluster

actions.name: GetCloudExadataInfrastructure
actions.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified Exadata infrastructure

actions.name: GetCloudExadataInfrastructureUnallocatedResources
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about unallocated resources in a specified Cloud Exadata Infrastructure

actions.name: GetCloudVmCluster
actions.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified VM cluster

actions.name: GetDbNode
actions.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified DB node

actions.name: GetDbServer
actions.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified database server

actions.name: GetOciOnboardingStatus
actions.description: Grants permission to get the tenancy activation link and onboarding status for your Amazon Web Services account

actions.name: GetOdbNetwork
actions.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified ODB network

actions.name: GetOdbPeeringConnection
actions.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified ODB Peering connection

actions.name: GetResourcePolicy
actions.description: Grants permission to get a resource policy

actions.name: InitializeService
actions.description: Grants permission to initialize the ODB service for the first time in an account

actions.name: ListAutonomousVirtualMachines
actions.description: Grants permission to list all Autonomous VMs in an Autonomous VM cluster

actions.name: ListCloudAutonomousVmClusters
actions.description: Grants permission to list all Autonomous VM clusters in a specified Cloud Exadata infrastructure

actions.name: ListCloudExadataInfrastructures
actions.description: Grants permission to list information about the Exadata infrastructures owned by your Amazon Web Services account

actions.name: ListCloudVmClusters
actions.description: Grants permission to list information about the VM clusters owned by your Amazon Web Services account or only the ones on the specified Exadata infrastructure

actions.name: ListDbNodes
actions.description: Grants permission to list information about the DB nodes for the specified VM cluster

actions.name: ListDbServers
actions.description: Grants permission to list information about the database servers that belong to the specified Exadata infrastructure

actions.name: ListDbSystemShapes
actions.description: Grants permission to list information about the shapes that are available for an Exadata infrastructure

actions.name: ListGiVersions
actions.description: Grants permission to list information about Oracle Grid Infrastructure (GI) software versions that are available for a VM cluster for the specified shape

actions.name: ListOdbNetworks
actions.description: Grants permission to list information about the ODB networks owned by your Amazon Web Services account

actions.name: ListOdbPeeringConnections
actions.description: Grants permission to list all ODB peering connections or those associated with a specific ODB network

actions.name: ListSystemVersions
actions.description: Grants permission to list information about the system versions that are available for a VM cluster for the specified giVersion and shape

actions.name: ListTagsForResource
actions.description: Grants permission to list information about the tags applied to this resource

actions.name: PutResourcePolicy
actions.description: Grants permission to update a resource policy

actions.name: RebootDbNode
actions.description: Grants permission to reboot the specified DB node in a VM cluster

actions.name: StartDbNode
actions.description: Grants permission to start the specified DB node in a VM cluster

actions.name: StopDbNode
actions.description: Grants permission to stop the specified DB node in a VM cluster

actions.name: TagResource
actions.description: Grants permission to apply tags to the specified resource

actions.name: UntagResource
actions.description: Grants permission to remove tags from the specified resource

actions.name: UpdateCloudExadataInfrastructure
actions.description: Grants permission to update the properties of an Exadata infrastructure resource

actions.name: UpdateGrantShare
actions.description: Grants permission to update an ODB Grant Share

actions.name: UpdateOdbNetwork
actions.description: Grants permission to update properties of a specified ODB network

actions.name: UpdateOdbPeeringConnection
actions.description: Grants permission to update properties of a specified ODB Peering Connection

actions.name: UpdateOutboundIntegration
actions.description: Grants permission to update an Outbound Integration
